case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AND CATHOLIC CHARITIES VS. HELEN KING et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AND CATHOLIC CHARITIES OF THE ARCHDIOCESE OF SAN FRANCISCO

CA. 94130, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KING, HELEN
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, - NO SASE, DOCUMENTS ARE PLACE IN THE OUT BOX FOR PICK UP.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KING, HELEN
